description: Log in to Splunk (http://localhost:8000) using username 'admin' and password 'SplunkAdmin1!'. Create a Classic (SimpleXML) dashboard named 'Targeted_User_Investigation' featuring an in-page drilldown. The dashboard must contain a panel displaying top targeted users based on failed logins in 'index=security_logs' aggregated by user. Configure this panel to set a token named 'clicked_user' upon selection. A second panel must display a timeline or statistics of attacking IPs filtered by the '$clicked_user$' token.
